name: Velora Crash Intelligence
description: AI-native crash data platform with 20+ tools for crash search, intersection analysis, attorney matching, and settlement estimation.

tools.name: search_crashes
tools.description: Search crash records by location, severity, date range, and crash type

tools.name: get_crash
tools.description: Get detailed crash record by ID including vehicles, persons, and narrative

tools.name: get_nearby_crashes
tools.description: Find crashes near a latitude/longitude within a radius

tools.name: get_intersection_stats
tools.description: Get danger score and crash statistics for an intersection

tools.name: get_intersection_trends
tools.description: Get temporal crash trends for an intersection

tools.name: search_attorneys
tools.description: Search personal injury attorneys by location and practice area

tools.name: get_attorney_profile
tools.description: Get detailed attorney profile with Review Intelligence scores

tools.name: get_attorney_index
tools.description: Get Attorney Index composite score for a specific attorney

tools.name: generate_equalizer
tools.description: Generate a Crash Equalizer briefing with comparable crashes, liability, and settlement context

tools.name: get_equalizer
tools.description: Retrieve existing Crash Equalizer briefing for a crash

tools.name: get_state_trends
tools.description: Get crash trend data for a state over time

tools.name: get_crash_type_distribution
tools.description: Get distribution of crash types for a location
